briefs.title: BC Updates Approved Screening Device and Driver Licensing Rules Effective February 2026
briefs.summary: BC amended two motor vehicle regulations on February 1, 2026: the Approved Screening Device Regulation (rules about roadside breath-testing devices) and the Motor Vehicle Act Regulations (general driver and vehicle rules). The specific new provisions were not published in full in this notice.
briefs.action_required: Check with a transport compliance advisor to confirm whether your drivers or vehicles are affected by the new provisions.
